节点.功能描述: Context information of the exit status of PhotoPicker, which can be used for on-site recovery of PhotoPicker next time.
The album URI from which the user exited during the last selection. The default value is empty string.
Timestamp of the first fully visible photo in the last selection interface. The default value is 0.
Filename of the first fully visible photo in the last selection interface. The default value is empty string.
Enum value of the recommendation content set by the user during the last selection (see `RecommendationType`). The default value is 0.
Enum value of the recommendation content selected by  the user during the last selection (see `RecommendationType`). The default value is 0.
Context data version number for validating compatibility of context recovery.
Enum value of the grid level by the user during the last selection. This information is only included when gridPinchModeType is configured as FULL_FUNCTION_GRID.

节点.功能描述:
Registers listening for the specified URI. This API uses a callback to return the result. If uri is the URI of an album, the value true means to listen for the changes of the files in the album; the value false means to listen for the changes of the album only. If uri is the URI of a photoAsset, there is no difference between true and false for forChildUris. If uri is DefaultChangeUri, forChildUris must be set to true. If forChildUris is false, the URI cannot be found and no message can be received. Multiple callback listeners can be registered for a URI. You can use unRegisterChange to unregister all listeners for the URI or a specified callback listener.
2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } uri - URI of the photo asset, URI of the album, or DefaultChangeUri.
@param { boolean } forChildUris - Whether to perform fuzzy listening.
@param { Callback<ChangeData> } callback - Callback used to return the ChangeData.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

PhotoViewMIMETypes represents the type of media resource that photo picker selects.
IMAGE_TYPE indicates that the selected media resources are images.
VIDEO_TYPE indicates that the selected media resources are videos.
IMAGE_VIDEO_TYPE indicates that the selected media resources are images and videos.
MOVING_PHOTO_IMAGE_TYPE indicates that the selected media resources are moving photos.
Enumeration type of filter operator.
Filter operator: equal to
Filter operator: not equal to
Filter operator: more than
Filter operator: less than
Filter operator: more than or equal to
Filter operator: less than or equal to
Filter operator: between
Enumeration type of single selection mode
browser mode
select directly mode
browser and select mode
Class BaseSelectOptions, which is extracted from class PhotoSelectOptions
The Type of the file in the picker window. Move from class PhotoSelectOptions to it's base class BaseSelectOptions
Maximum number of images for a single selection. Move from class PhotoSelectOptions to it's base class BaseSelectOptions
Support search. Move from class PhotoSelectOptions to it's base class BaseSelectOptions
Support taking photos. Move from class PhotoSelectOptions to it's base class BaseSelectOptions
The recommendation options when use recommendation photo function. Move from class PhotoSelectOptions to it's base class BaseSelectOptions
The uri for the preselected files. Move from class PhotoSelectOptions to it's base class BaseSelectOptions
Support preview in single selection mode or not
The mode of single selection
Media file filtering configuration.
Media file size filtering configuration.
Media file video duration filtering configuration.

Configures filter conditions as a string array, supporting multiple combined conditions to specify supported file types. When this parameter is set, the original file type configuration parameters `MIMEType` and `mimeTypeFilter` become invalid.
Media file type and size combined filtering configuration. The array supports a maximum length of 3. Setting this parameter will cause the `fileSizeFilter` and `MIMEType` parameters to be ignored.
Support showing moving photo badge.
Media asset filtering configuration.
Moving photo playback mode. Supports up to two modes.
Grid pinch mode.
Initial state for global moving photos. Only MOVING_PHOTO_ENABLE and MOVING_PHOTO_DISABLE are supported for configuration. Defaults to MOVING_PHOTO_ENABLE, which enables the dynamic effect.
Enumerates the types of the moving photo badge.
NOT_MOVING_PHOTO indicates that non-moving photos.
MOVING_PHOTO_ENABLED indicates that the motion photo effect is activated.
MOVING_PHOTO_DISABLED indicates that the motion photo effect is deactivated.
Media file filtering configuration.
Indicates the media file type to be filtered.
Media file size filtering configuration.
Specifing filter operator.
Specifing the size of files to be filtered.
Specifing the upper limit of file size to be filtered.
Media file video duration filtering configuration.
Specifing filter operator.
Specifing the video duration of files to be filtered.
Specifing the upper limit of video duration to be filtered.
Media file type and size combined filtering configuration.
Specifing filter Type.
Specifing file size filtering configuration.
Indicates possible value types
Operation item
The type of the operation
The field of the operation.
The value of the operation. The value length follows operationType-specific limit N (max 10), truncated to first N if exceeded.
Request read permission result
The list of authorized URI.
The list of invalid URI.
Grid pinch mode

The default grid level.

Support editing photos.
Support select original photo or not
SubWindow name
Complete button text
Context recovery information for restoring the last selection session.
Support destruction with navigation.
Support setting the max photo select number.
Support setting the max video select number.
In single selection mode, supports returning to the photo browser page after taking and confirming a photo.
Defines the image recommendation options. The image recommendation feature depends on the image data analysis capability, which varies with devices.
Type of the recommended image.
Text based on which images are recommended. If both recommendationType and textContextInfo are set, textContextInfo takes precedence over recommendationType.
Represents the text information about the recommended images.
Text based on which images are recommended. The text cannot exceed 250 characters. The default value is an empty string.
Defines information about the images or videos selected.

URIs of the images or videos selected. The URI array can be used only by calling photoAccessHelper.getAssets with temporary authorization. For details about how to use the media file URI, see Using a Media File URI.
Whether the selected media asset is the original image. The value true means that the selected media asset is the original image, and false means the opposite. The default value is false.
Contextual information about the PhotoPicker's exit state.
Moving photo badge states for the selected media files in the gallery. When isMovingPhotoBadgeShown is true, movingPhotoBadgeStates contains the moving photo states; otherwise, it is empty.
Provides APIs for the user to select images and videos. Before using the APIs of PhotoViewPicker, you need to create a PhotoViewPicker instance.

Pull up the photo picker based on the selection mode.

Enumeration type of operation.
Matches fields that are equal to the specified value. The value length is limited to 1.
Matches fields that are not equal to the specified value. The value length is limited to 1.
Matches fields that are greater than the specified value. The value length is limited to 1.
Matches fields that are less than the specified value. The value length is limited to 1.
Matches fields that are greater than or equal to the specified value. The value length is limited to 1.
Matches fields that are less than or equal to the specified value. The value length is limited to 1.
Equivalent to the "AND" operator in SQL. No field or value parameters required.
Equivalent to the "OR" operator in SQL. No field or value parameters required.
Matches fields within the specified range. The value length is limited to 10.
Matches fields outside the specified range. The value length is limited to 10.
Used to add a left parenthesis to the predicate, equivalent to the "(" in SQL. Must be used together with a right parenthesis. No field or value parameters required.
Used to add a right parenthesis to the predicate, equivalent to the ")" in SQL. Must be used together with a left parenthesis. No field or value parameters required.
Matches fields within the specified range. The interval is inclusive of both endpoints (closed interval). The value length is limited to 2, representing the left and right boundaries.
Matches fields outside the specified range. The interval is exclusive of both endpoints (open interval). The value length is limited to 2, representing the left and right boundaries.

节点.功能描述: Automatic playback scene of moving photo.
Type of moving photo scene.
Play mode of moving photo in different scenes.
Enumeration type of scene.
GRID_TO_PHOTO_BROWSER indicates that the view is transitioning from the grid to the photo browser.
PHOTO_BROWSER_SWIPE indicates that a swipe operation occurs in the photo browser.
Enumeration type of grid pinch mode.
FULL_FUNCTION_GRID indicates that the grid supports selection and other operations after pinch-to-zoom gesture.
Enumeration type of grid level.
SPACIOUS indicates that a grid layout with one fewer column than the standard grid level.
STANDARD indicates that the standard grid level across different forms or states.
COMPACT indicates that a grid layout with one more column than the standard grid level.
Enumeration type of play mode.
DEFAULT indicates that the default play mode.
AUTO_PLAY indicates that moving photos will play automatically.
Enumeration of video mode type
Default type
Log video
